elementor.title: Authenticated Remote Code Execution (CVE-2024-2117)
elementor.solution: Update Elementor to 3.19.1 or later immediately

contact-form-7.title: Unrestricted File Upload (CVE-2023-6449)
contact-form-7.solution: Update Contact Form 7 to 5.8.4 or later immediately

contact-form-7.title: Arbitrary File Upload (CVE-2020-35489)
contact-form-7.solution: Update Contact Form 7 to 5.3.2 or later

woocommerce.title: Authentication Bypass (CVE-2023-28121)
woocommerce.solution: Update WooCommerce to 6.6.1 or later immediately

wordpress-seo.title: Stored XSS via breadcrumb title (CVE-2024-4041)
wordpress-seo.solution: Update Yoast SEO to 22.3 or later

wordpress-seo.title: Reflected XSS (CVE-2023-40680)
wordpress-seo.solution: Update Yoast SEO to 20.3 or later

jetpack.title: Critical authentication bypass (CVE-2024-5765)
jetpack.solution: Update Jetpack to 13.3.1 or later immediately

wpforms-lite.title: Stored XSS in form fields (CVE-2024-0585)
wpforms-lite.solution: Update WPForms Lite to 1.8.5.4 or later

all-in-one-seo-pack.title: SQL Injection (CVE-2024-1071)
all-in-one-seo-pack.solution: Update All in One SEO to 4.6.0 or later immediately

all-in-one-seo-pack.title: Privilege Escalation (CVE-2023-0586)
all-in-one-seo-pack.solution: Update All in One SEO to 4.2.9 or later

really-simple-ssl.title: Authentication Bypass (CVE-2023-49583)
really-simple-ssl.solution: Update Really Simple SSL to 7.2.0 or later immediately

updraftplus.title: Arbitrary Backup Download (CVE-2022-0633)
updraftplus.solution: Update UpdraftPlus to 1.22.3 or later immediately

litespeed-cache.title: Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation (CVE-2024-28000)
litespeed-cache.solution: Update LiteSpeed Cache to 6.1 or later immediately

litespeed-cache.title: Stored XSS (CVE-2024-0448)
litespeed-cache.solution: Update LiteSpeed Cache to 5.7.0.1 or later

wp-super-cache.title: Stored XSS (CVE-2023-2689)
wp-super-cache.solution: Update WP Super Cache to 1.9.5 or later

w3-total-cache.title: Stored XSS (CVE-2023-5359)
w3-total-cache.solution: Update W3 Total Cache to 2.3.2 or later

duplicate-post.title: Insecure Permissions (CVE-2023-3763)
duplicate-post.solution: Update Yoast Duplicate Post to 4.5.1 or later

wp-mail-smtp.title: Sensitive Data Exposure (CVE-2024-3689)
wp-mail-smtp.solution: Update WP Mail SMTP to 3.11.0 or later

sucuri-scanner.title: Stored XSS via admin panel (CVE-2023-2995)
sucuri-scanner.solution: Update Sucuri Scanner to 1.8.40 or later

better-wp-security.title: Authentication Bypass (CVE-2024-1587)
better-wp-security.solution: Update iThemes Security to 9.0.0 or later

limit-login-attempts-reloaded.title: IP bypass via headers (CVE-2023-4631)
limit-login-attempts-reloaded.solution: Update Limit Login Attempts Reloaded to 2.25.22 or later

ninja-forms.title: Multiple Reflected XSS (CVE-2023-37979)
ninja-forms.solution: Update Ninja Forms to 3.6.26 or later immediately

formidable.title: Stored XSS (CVE-2024-0587)
formidable.solution: Update Formidable Forms to 6.5.1 or later

user-role-editor.title: Privilege Escalation (CVE-2023-3489)
user-role-editor.solution: Update User Role Editor to 4.64 or later immediately

google-site-kit.title: Information Disclosure (CVE-2024-2088)
google-site-kit.solution: Update Site Kit by Google to 1.120.0 or later
